mapper.select: SELECT id, eq_id, collected_at, pm10, pm25, ntc_temp, ct1, ct2, ct3, ct4, ir_temp_max, ex_temp, ex_humidity, state FROM sensor_reading WHERE eq_id = #{eqId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT latest.state AS state, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT sr.eq_id, sr.state FROM sensor_reading sr INNER JOIN ( SELECT eq_id, MAX(collected_at) AS max_collected FROM sensor_reading GROUP BY eq_id ) t ON sr.eq_id = t.eq_id AND sr.collected_at = t.max_collected ) latest GROUP BY latest.state

SELECT id, eq_id, collected_at, pm10, pm25, pm10_val, ntc_temp, ct1, ct2, ct3, ct4, ir_temp_max, ir_x, ir_y, ex_temp, ex_humidity, ex_lux, state, cumulative_operating_day, equipment_history FROM sensor_reading WHERE eq_id = #{eqId} AND id > #{lastId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensor_reading WHERE eq_id = #{eqId}
